parameters.content:
## SUB — SMTP Check

**Input** (via Execute Workflow — passes `{ domain, candidates, mode }` from orchestrator):
- `domain` — string, e.g. `firma.cz`
- `candidates` — string[], email addresses to test
- `mode` — string (name/verify/probe, passed through for context)

**Output:**
```
{ status, is_catch_all, domain, mx_host, candidates[{email,accepted,code}] }
```
- `status`: `no_mx` | `smtp_error` | `catch_all` | `partial_match` | `all_rejected`
- `is_catch_all`: boolean — true means server accepts everything (real probe needed)

**Caller:** `wf-email-finder-v2` node `Execute SMTP Check` (wfefv2-0031)
**Caller pattern:** n8n-nodes-base.executeWorkflow, waitForSubWorkflow: true
